user_request: Fix the login validation bug, update docs, run tests, and create a PR.
goal: Fix the login validation bug: update docs, run tests, and create a PR.
constraints: Do not change the public API signature of validate_login()
All existing tests must continue to pass
PR must reference the bug ticket

success_criteria.description: Bug is fixed: source code diff exists with the change
Tests pass: all relevant tests complete without failure
Documentation updated: relevant doc sections exist and are current
Pull request created or exists in the repository
